requires.rationale: ranking signal aggregates real usage, not just text-match

structure.description: Search result rows display a relevance score (PageRank-like, derived from lineage + query frequency + viewer count) as visible signal alongside text-match. Sort defaults to relevance; users can flip to recency/name.

rationale.hypothesis: Pure text matching surfaces obscure tables. Usage-weighted ranking elevates the entities people actually use, providing 'social proof of correct entity'. Score visibility lets users judge whether the top hit is authoritative.

evidence.description: Search ranks via PageRank on lineage + usage score

counterexample.description: Without usage history, ranking signal is uniform

shouldMatch.reason: Run frequency + invocation count = usage signal
